title: .NET 9.0 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 10.
description:
[9.0.109-2.0.1]
- Add support for Oracle Linux

[9.0.109-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.109 and Runtime 9.0.8
- Resolves: RHEL-106727

[9.0.108-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.108 and Runtime 9.0.7
- Resolves: RHEL-100597

[9.0.107-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.107 and Runtime 9.0.6
- Resolves: RHEL-94423

[9.0.106-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.106 and Runtime 9.0.5
- Resolves: RHEL-89452

[9.0.105-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.105 and Runtime 9.0.4
- Resolves: RHEL-85281

[9.0.104-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.104 and Runtime 9.0.3
- Resolves: RHEL-81647

[9.0.103-2]
- Update to .NET SDK 9.0.103 and Runtime 9.0.2
- Resolves: RHEL-76904

[9.0.102-2]
- Disable bootstrap
- Related: RHEL-71549

[9.0.102-1]
- Rebootstrap
- Related: RHEL-71549
